{{Quote|Hello. I'm afraid I'm not very good at explaining things. If you have any questions, please ask my husband.|Rilka, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Rilka''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] who lived on the agrarian [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. During the [[Jedi Civil War]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]], she lived on one of Dantooine's northern [[Farm/Legends|farms]] with her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Gar (Dantooine)|Gar]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date1">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]{{'s}} trials, in [[3956 BBY]]. [[Juhani]] fled the Enclave shortly before Revan completed his trials, placing the events in the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|padawan]] [[Juhani]], believing she had [[Death/Legends|killed]] her [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Quatra]] in anger, fled to an [[ancient grove]] used by Jedi to meditate. The grove became tainted by Juhani's emotions, causing [[Kath hound/Legends|Kath hounds]] in the area to become aggressive, even attacking some settlers.<ref name="KOTOR" /> A few weeks after the [[Destruction of Taris|destruction]] of the Outer Rim [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]],<ref name="Date2">Revan arrived on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] immediately following the [[Destruction of Taris|destruction]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In-game dialogue places the beginning of Revan's trials, where he gains access to the courtyard and thus Rilka, a few weeks after his arrival.</ref> Rilka and her husband traveled to the [[Jedi Enclave]] on Dantooine seeking an audience with the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council|Jedi Council]] there. They wanted to petition the Council for protection from the Kath hounds and [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] raiders that had been afflicting the settlers for some time.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
While waiting in the Enclave's courtyard, Rilka was approached by former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who had [[Amnesia/Legends|lost]] his memories and was retraining as a Jedi at the Enclave. She told Revan that she wasn't good at explaining things and directed him to Gar instead. While he was speaking with Gar, she mentioned that it was a pleasure to meet Revan.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Rilka appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. Interactions with her are optional and do not affect alignment, nor do they progress any plot or quest.<ref name="KOTOR" />
